title: cotoneaster spathulatus
intro: Cotoneaster spathulatus, also known as the fan-leaved cotoneaster, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family and is native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been used to treat various health issues. The cotoneaster spathulatus is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and supporting digestive health. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and stems are used in herbal medicine to make infusions and decoctions for various health remedies.
